allow: Bash(git pull *)

Bash(git push *)
Read(//mnt/c/3WMC/CarGuy/**)
Bash(npx tsc *)
Bash(npx ts-node *)
PowerShell(Get-Process *)
PowerShell(Receive-Job *)
PowerShell(Get-Job *)
PowerShell(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/users" -Method GET -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell($body = '{"username": "max_mustermann", "password": "password123"}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "accessToken: $\($response.accessToken.Substring\(0,30\)\)..."; Write-Output "expiresAt: $\($response.expiresAt\)"; Write-Output "user: $\($response.user.username\)")

PowerShell($ts = [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow.ToString\("o"\); Write-Output "Current UTC: $ts"; $expires = [DateTimeOffset]::Parse\("2026-05-12T06:47:57.957Z"\); $diff = $expires - [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow; Write-Output "Token läuft ab in: $\([math]::Round\($diff.TotalMinutes\)\) Minuten")
PowerShell(netstat *)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep 5; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/users" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 3 | Select-Object -First 1 } catch { Write-Output "Server nicht erreichbar: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"username": "max_mustermann", "password": "password123"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; $expires = [DateTimeOffset]::Parse\($r.expiresAt\); $diff = $expires - [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow; Write-Output "Token laeuft ab in: $\([math]::Round\($diff.TotalHours, 1\)\) Stunden"; Write-Output "User: $\($r.user.username\)")

PowerShell($ts = [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow.ToUnixTimeMilliseconds\(\); $body = "{`"publicname`": `"TestUser`", `"username`": `"testuser_$ts`", `"password`": `"test1234`"}"; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "accessToken: $\(if \($r.accessToken\) { $r.accessToken.Substring\(0,30\) + '...' } else { 'FEHLT!' }\)"; $expires = [DateTimeOffset]::Parse\($r.expiresAt\); $diff = $expires - [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow; Write-Output "Token laeuft ab in: $\([math]::Round\($diff.TotalHours, 1\)\) Stunden"; Write-Output "User: $\($r.user.username\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts/comments/1" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "Backend OK - Comments geladen: $\($r.Count\)" } catch { Write-Output "Fehler: $_" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep 8; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts/comments/1" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Backend OK" } catch { Write-Output "Fehler: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"content":"Test Kommentar","author":{"uid":1,"username":"max_mustermann","publicname":"Max M.","password":"","role":"user","createdAt":"2025-01-15"},"post":{"pid":1,"title":"Test","content":"Test","publishedAt":"2025-01-15","likes":0,"dislikes":0}}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/comment" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Comment erstellt: $\($r.message\)" } catch { Write-Output "Fehler: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 8; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts/forum/1" -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object pid, likes, commentCount | Select-Object -First 3 } catch { Write-Output "Fehler: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts/forum/1" -TimeoutSec 5; $r | Select-Object pid, likes, commentCount | Select-Object -First 3 } catch { Write-Output "Fehler: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts/forum/1" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Posts: $\($r.Count\)"; $r | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "pid=$\($_.pid\) likes=$\($_.likes\) commentCount=$\($_.commentCount\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts/1/like" -Method PATCH; Write-Output "like: $\($r.message\)"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts/1/unlike" -Method PATCH; Write-Output "unlike: $\($r2.message\)")
